lines.text: Inventories disaggregated per ASC 330 330-10-50-1, 330-10-50-4, 330-10-35-1B: raw materials $5,200,000,000, work in process $1,800,000,000, finished goods $3,400,000,000, supplies $200,000,000. Total inventories $10,600,000,000. Costing method: weighted-average. Lower-of-cost-or-net-realizable-value writedown $120,000,000.

Cost of goods manufactured rollforward per ASC 330 COGM supplementary schedule: beginning raw materials $5,000,000,000, purchases $18,000,000,000, ending raw materials $5,200,000,000, raw materials used $17,800,000,000; direct labor $3,200,000,000, manufacturing overhead $2,100,000,000, total manufacturing costs $23,100,000,000; beginning WIP $1,600,000,000, ending WIP $1,800,000,000, cost of goods manufactured $22,900,000,000; beginning finished goods $3,200,000,000, ending finished goods $3,400,000,000, cost of goods sold $22,700,000,000 reconciled to income statement COGS.
